batches.title: Fix Clean Lifecycle State
acceptance_criteria: Repository is in a clean state with no uncommitted changes

batches.title: Secure Production API Test Script
acceptance_criteria: Password is no longer passed via CLI arguments
Sensitive data is read from environment variables or secure stdin
Script execution is verified against process list exposure

batches.title: Fix API Test Logic and Truncation
acceptance_criteria: Short-circuit logic in grep check is fixed to report actual status
Truncated function/flow is completed or removed
Set -euo pipefail works correctly with python3 redirection

batches.title: Secure Forge Setup URL
acceptance_criteria: Git clone uses secure, variable-based URL
Idempotency check handles clone failures gracefully

batches.title: Fix Lock Validation Logic
acceptance_criteria: Stale lock detection uses timestamp inside the file
Logic does not rely on filesystem mtime

batches.title: Add Error Handling to Self-Test
acceptance_criteria: Shebang includes `set -e`
Script exits immediately on command failure

batches.title: Sanitize Brief Documentation
acceptance_criteria: Example API key is removed or replaced with a placeholder
No sensitive strings remain in the file

batches.title: Fix Forge Setup State Management
acceptance_criteria: Step file is not marked done if npm ci or validation fails
Validation runs only if npm ci succeeds
npm ci stderr is visible for debugging

batches.title: Fix Forge Git Network Handling
acceptance_criteria: Git pull checks for connectivity
Merge conflicts are detected before proceeding

batches.title: Refactor Budget Lock Operations
acceptance_criteria: Atomics.wait replaced with non-blocking alternative or handled in worker
SIGINT signals are handled during wait
RenameSync fallback ensures atomicity

batches.title: Secure Checkpoint Metadata
acceptance_criteria: Variables in echo statements are quoted
Injection of malicious characters is prevented

batches.title: Fix Checkpoint Selection Reliability
acceptance_criteria: Resume command sorts checkpoints deterministically
Logic does not rely on non-sequential filesystem timestamps

batches.title: Fix Health Check Script
acceptance_criteria: Grep pattern is compatible with macOS (BSD) and GNU
Script iterates completely over SCAN_FILES

batches.title: Hardening Jigs Scripts
acceptance_criteria: Checksums used instead of repeated diff in master-plan-unique.sh
PARENT variable validation added
Positional argument validation added in no-trailing-whitespace.sh

batches.title: Fix Evaluation Pipeline Robustness
acceptance_criteria: Pipeline verifies existence of SPEC.md and PLAN.md
File copy operations do not suppress errors

batches.title: Refactor Pipeline Configurations
acceptance_criteria: Circular dependency risk in DOGFOOD workflow addressed
Truncated JSON message in demo.json fixed
Handoff path matches repo-root context

batches.title: Complete Playbooks and Protocols
acceptance_criteria: Truncated sentences in playbooks completed
max_usd cap enforcement logic added to text-mode runs
Concurrency documentation completed

batches.title: Cleanup Code Quality and Docs
acceptance_criteria: Hardcoded AGENT_ID removed or parameterized
Fragile ls -t | head -1 replaced
Content-Type charset added to PHP snippet
Mock data removed from logs, schema consistent
Documentation aligned with standard conventions
